non_blocking_issues: cappedNavPush itemSize sampled from visibleItemsInfo.firstOrNull() (item at visual top after scrollToItem, not necessarily target); approximate for heterogeneous heights but errs conservative.

createSessionInWorkdir preserves previous session's ChatState.currentModel; fix now persists this inherited model on materialization. Not a regression (visible model + send-time fallback match before/after); users entering draft from a model-specific session may carry that model without explicit choice. Cross-session leak prevented by SessionSwitcher.switchTo Step 2 clearing currentModel on session switch.
cappedNavPush marked suspend but performs only synchronous reads of listState.layoutInfo; could be a plain function.
notes: Both fixes correctly reasoned/implemented. cappedNavPush safe conservative clamp across all three call sites. switchSessionModel draft-mode update + materialization persistence at correct point (after session.id known, before dispatchSend). Model-resolution chain complete with no stale-state gaps.
